steps.name: Wire up tests + verify all AC + real browser

decisions: 2026-07-17 reconciliation: workspace UI files (Topbar.tsx, PipelineStepper.tsx, SceneFormPanel.tsx, ScenePlayerPanel.tsx, SceneSidebar.tsx, ApproveBar.tsx, useAutosave.ts, workspace-context.tsx, schema-form/generate.ts) had already landed on origin/main via commit d37a9ab. This session re-verified that work against the task's Scope/AC/DoD and found real gaps — completed them rather than blindly marking done.

Found & fixed real bugs in the already-merged code: (1) SceneFormPanel.tsx called useMemo at module scope (Rules-of-Hooks violation) — converted the schema fixture to a plain const. (2) Topbar.tsx imported StatusBadge via a wrong relative path ('./ui/status-badge' instead of '@/components/ui/status-badge') — the route would 500 in a real build. (3) layout.tsx imported Topbar/PipelineStepper as named exports when both are default exports, and passed `initialState={{projectId}}` instead of the required `projectId` prop. (4) layout.tsx destructured Next.js 15's `params` synchronously (now a Promise) — fixed via React's `use()`. (5) An orphaned, unused `workspace-store.ts` (zustand) duplicated `workspace-context.tsx` (Context) and was never imported anywhere — deleted as dead code rather than adding the missing zustand dependency for nothing. (6) PipelineStepper.tsx used the native `disabled` attribute on locked stations, which suppresses hover/focus events in real browsers — this silently broke the BR-2 tooltip; switched to `aria-disabled` only, caught by a failing test.

Backend: no scenes API existed at all (GET/PUT/approve). Added app/api/scenes.py + app/services/scene_service.py, storing scenes inside the existing step_versions (step='scene_set') insert-only model. Approval state is intentionally NOT added to app/schemas/scene.py's Scene contract (extra='forbid', the render/cache-key contract) — added a separate scene_approvals table/model instead, joined in at read time. Editing an approved scene clears its approval (edit invalidates review).

Discovered and fixed pre-existing, unrelated model bugs that blocked any code path from importing the full model registry: models/__init__.py was empty (SQLAlchemy relationship() string lookups like 'Project' silently failed until something forced full mapper configuration); status_history.py was missing the `relationship` import; project.py had an indentation bug breaking Python parsing entirely; step_versions.project_id had no ForeignKey at the ORM level (and the migration lacked one at the DB level too) despite a relationship() assuming one existed — added migration 007 to fix the DB-level gap.

Frontend test runner (npm test / vitest) was completely broken repo-wide: vitest.config.ts imported '@vitejs/plugin-react' and tests imported '@testing-library/react', neither declared in package.json; no path-alias resolution in vitest.config.ts for '@/*'. Added the missing devDependencies, jest-dom setup, and vite alias — this was blocking every task's frontend test verification, not just 5-1's.
Contract change: added POST /projects/{id}/scenes/{scene_id}/approve + `approved` field on GET scenes response — documented in docs/specs/api-spec.md §6 per rules/documentation.md.

Real-browser verification: started npm run dev, hit /projects/{id}/scenes, confirmed clean 200 response, topbar/stepper/3-column layout/ApproveBar text all render, no Next.js/React errors in server log (previously there was a hard 'params should be awaited' error before the layout.tsx fix).

Scope boundary honored: did not wire SceneFormPanel's autosave to the real PUT endpoint or the ApproveBar to the new approve endpoint — that remains fixture-based per the task's own Scope Out ('controls chi tiết (5-2)'); the backend contract + UI scaffolding is what 5-1 owns.

Did NOT fix: pre-existing, out-of-lane tsc errors in admin/api-keys, admin/users (1-7), scene-player hooks tests (2-3), useEventStream.ts, e2e login.spec.ts implicit-any params — all outside this task's file set, left for their owning tasks.

Did not attempt Playwright e2e (offline-simulation, NVDA) — no Playwright browsers installed in this sandbox and out of reasonable time budget for this pass; vitest covers the PipelineStepper/StaleConfirmDialog/useAutosave/schema-form unit-level AC instead. Flagged as a residual gap, not silently skipped.
